items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
items.name_cn:
[Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
Beige quilted V-shaped leather
Gold-tone hardware
Brown suede texture, microfiber lining
Double G logo
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Handle height: 22cm
Zip closure

items.name_en: 【With full set of packaging】!!️Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
【With full set of packaging】!!️Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from glossy leather and features an adjustable shoulder strap.
Model: 815700.
Size: 21.5(L) x 11(H) x 8cm(D)
Color: Brown/Canvas.

items.name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus bag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Oatmeal leather trim adds depth to the design, incorporating tonal elements and contrasting textures.
